themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "For the LORD thy God blesseth thee, as he promised thee: and thou shalt lend unto many nation...". Cross references echo "Blessing".
